title: lepidium flavum
intro: Lepidium flavum, also known as yellow cress, is a flowering plant species within the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lepidium flavum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a garnish in some recipes.
